Input.string: 30% increased Charm Charges Gained +1 Charm Slot
Input.name: questAct 2Valley of the TitansMedallion

Input.string: #Resistances on gear till cap +100% to all resistances #Inevitable Crits 30% more damage #Zenith 30% more damage #Mana tempest for bosses ONLY Gain 86% of damage as extra lightning damage #Flamewall Infused Projectiles 42 to 64 added fire damage 5 to 101 added lightning damage
Input.name: customMods
